mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_project_product_af_from_sms (projectCode, orderCodereal, corporationCode, ssfrId, productCode, productfirstCode, productName, productfirstName, productsubCode, productSubModel, productSubName, num, borrowNum) values (#{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderCodereal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{corporationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ssfrId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productfirstCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productfirstName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productsubCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productSubModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productSubName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{borrowNum,jdbcType=INTEGER})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_project_product_af_from_sms
projectCode,
orderCodereal,
corporationCode,
ssfrId,
productCode,
productfirstCode,
productName,
productfirstName,
productsubCode,
productSubModel,
productSubName,
num,
borrowNum,
#{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orderCodereal,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{corporationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ssfrId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{productfirstCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{productfirstName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{productsubCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{productSubModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{productSubName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{borrowNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.select:
select * from pm_project_product_af_from_sms
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectCode = #{projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
orderCodereal = #{orderCodereal, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
corporationCode = #{corporationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ssfrId = #{ssfrId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
productCode = #{productCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productfirstCode = #{productfirstCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productName = #{productName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productfirstName = #{productfirstName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productsubCode = #{productsubCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productSubModel = #{productSubModel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productSubName = #{productSubName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
num = #{num, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
borrowNum = #{borrowNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

select count(1) from pm_project_product_af_from_sms
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectCode = #{projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
orderCodereal = #{orderCodereal, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
corporationCode = #{corporationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ssfrId = #{ssfrId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
productCode = #{productCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productfirstCode = #{productfirstCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productName = #{productName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productfirstName = #{productfirstName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productsubCode = #{productsubCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productSubModel = #{productSubModel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productSubName = #{productSubName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
num = #{num, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
borrowNum = #{borrowNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

select * from pm_project_product_af_from_sms
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectCode = #{model.projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
orderCodereal = #{model.orderCodereal, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
corporationCode = #{model.corporationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ssfrId = #{model.ssfrId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
productCode = #{model.productCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productfirstCode = #{model.productfirstCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productName = #{model.productName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productfirstName = #{model.productfirstName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productsubCode = #{model.productsubCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productSubModel = #{model.productSubModel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productSubName = #{model.productSubName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
num = #{model.num, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
borrowNum = #{model.borrowNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( projectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or orderCodereal like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or corporationCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productfirstCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productfirstName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productsubCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productSubModel like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productSubName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from pm_project_product_af_from_sms
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectCode = #{model.projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
orderCodereal = #{model.orderCodereal, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
corporationCode = #{model.corporationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ssfrId = #{model.ssfrId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
productCode = #{model.productCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productfirstCode = #{model.productfirstCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productName = #{model.productName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productfirstName = #{model.productfirstName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productsubCode = #{model.productsubCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productSubModel = #{model.productSubModel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
productSubName = #{model.productSubName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
num = #{model.num, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
borrowNum = #{model.borrowNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( projectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or orderCodereal like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or corporationCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productfirstCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productfirstName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productsubCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productSubModel like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or productSubName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
